name: load_msg_db
full_help:
load_msg_db

Description: 
Load Message Db file

Syntax: 
load_msg_db  [-file <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-file]     Message file to be loaded
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
